ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Hearing That Bond Has Been Posted: 7-6-2026 + Osc.

Petition To Suspend Trustee, Bring Trust Under Court Supervision
Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Andrew Schultz, Esq.
Katherine Lynch
Petitioner in pro per, Maxwell Eberitzsch

On for Petition to suspend the trustee - intends to grant bond fixed at $91,000
Harrington appointed as referee with respect to appraisal of the property. Proposed order
Maxwell Eberitzsch heard on the issue of bond and set at 0 or a nominal amount. Court sets at $20,000.00.

Status of accounting during the prior period for former trustee.
Maxwell Eberitzsch request OSC GRANTED for order to appear to show contempt why he did not appear and has not provided and accounting. Why the court should not issue $250 sanctions JACK KENYON LYNCH EBERITZSCH 7-6-2026.

Compliance hearing that bond has been posted: 7-6-2026.

Petition appointing Maxwell Eberitzsch taken under submission with the intent to granted. 8-16-2027 hearing date on first accounting, submit one week before.

ANDREW SCHULTZ REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE = GRANTED, HE IS RELIEVED OF HIS RESPONSIBLITIES IN THIS CASE

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Suspended Trustee'S Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jul-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Andrew Schultz, Esq.
Katherine Lynch
Petitioner in pro per, Maxwell Eberitzsch

On for Petition to suspend the trustee - intends to grant bond fixed at $91,000
Harrington appointed as referee with respect to appraisal of the property. Proposed order
Maxwell Eberitzsch heard on the issue of bond and set at 0 or a nominal amount. Court sets at $20,000.00.

Status of accounting during the prior period for former trustee.
Maxwell Eberitzsch request OSC GRANTED for order to appear to show contempt why he did not appear and has not provided and accounting. Why the court should not issue $250 sanctions JACK KENYON LYNCH EBERITZSCH 7-6-2026.

Compliance hearing that bond has been posted: 7-6-2026.

Petition appointing Maxwell Eberitzsch taken under submission with the intent to granted. 8-16-2027 hearing date on first accounting, submit one week before.

ANDREW SCHULTZ REQUEST FOR DISCHARGE = GRANTED, HE IS RELIEVED OF HIS RESPONSIBLITIES IN THIS CASE

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)
